# CastApp — Copilot Instructions

React Native + Expo (TypeScript) app for casting video from Android to DLNA TVs.
All streaming runs on-device — NO external servers.

Primary target TV: Philips 55OLED770 (UPnP port 49153)
Stack: Zustand, react-native-webview, react-native-tcp-socket, react-native-udp

Dark theme: bg #0d0d1a, accent #00d4ff
Always use StyleSheet.create(), TouchableOpacity, FlatList.
Never add any type without strict TypeScript.
